title: JavaFX Region
summary: The JavaFX Region class is a base class for several JavaFX layout container classes like Pane, HBox and VBox. The JavaFX Region properties are thus shared by these subclasses.
content: The JavaFX Region class is a base class for several JavaFX layout container classes like Pane, HBox and VBox. The JavaFX Region properties are thus shared by these subclasses.
